'''ngasholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetyltanghinin|deacetyltanghinin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetyltanghinin|deacetyltanghinin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngasholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæsheleth|ngæsheleth]] || [[word:ngæshelej|ngæshelej]] || [[word:ngæshelesh|ngæshelesh]] || [[word:ngæshele|ngæshele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashosholoth|ngashosholoth]] || [[word:ngashosholoj|ngashosholoj]] || [[word:ngashosholosh|ngashosholosh]] || [[word:ngashosholo|ngashosholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasholoth|ngasholoth]] || [[word:ngasholoj|ngasholoj]] || [[word:ngasholosh|ngasholosh]] || [[word:ngasholo|ngasholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashofloth|ngashofloth]] || [[word:ngashofloj|ngashofloj]] || [[word:ngashoflosh|ngashoflosh]] || [[word:ngashoflof|ngashoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngasholotho|ngasholotho]] || [[word:ngasholojo|ngasholojo]] || [[word:ngasholosho|ngasholosho]] || [[word:ngasholoko|ngasholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngasholoth|ngasholoth]] || [[word:ngasholoj|ngasholoj]] || [[word:ngasholosh|ngasholosh]] || [[word:ngasholo|ngasholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngasholothol|ngasholothol]] || [[word:ngasholojol|ngasholojol]] || [[word:ngasholoshol|ngasholoshol]] || [[word:ngasholokol|ngasholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngasholothotho|ngasholothotho]] || [[word:ngasholojojo|ngasholojojo]] || [[word:ngasholoshosho|ngasholoshosho]] || [[word:ngasholoko|ngasholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngasholothon|ngasholothon]] || [[word:ngasholojon|ngasholojon]] || [[word:ngasholoshon|ngasholoshon]] || [[word:ngasholokon|ngasholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngasholothoro|ngasholothoro]] || [[word:ngasholojoro|ngasholojoro]] || [[word:ngasholoshoro|ngasholoshoro]] || [[word:ngasholokoro|ngasholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
